name: DA LIFE GOLF & EVENT CENTER
address: 12105 W Alameda Pkwy Suite 140, Lakewood, CO 80228
about: DA LIFE GOLF & EVENT CENTER is Lakewood, Colorado's premier indoor golf simulator venue. The facility utilizes Full Swing technology to track key swing and ball-striking data, offering a space for golfers to refine their game. Beyond individual practice, the venue fosters a community atmosphere through leagues, event center functions, and partnerships with local organizations. It operates on a mixed pricing model with hourly bookings, memberships, and private event rentals available to cater to a diverse range of customers.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing technology provides detailed swing data and ball tracking to help translate practice to the course
Ability to play iconic courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews alongside the pros
Multiple formats are available, including matchplay and Ryder Cup style
Welcoming community atmosphere and social environment for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of an on-site kitchen or food service.
No mention of an alcohol bar. BYOB is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as the simulator technology provider used for tracking swing and ball-striking data.
